title: MCD Weapons&Tools
description:
Brings Minecraft Dungeon Styled Weapons and Tools to your world!
Requires Optifine or Cit Reswen
body:
# ***REQUIRES [CIT RESEWN](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) OR [OPTIFINE](https://www.optifine.net) TO WORK***

# **MCD Weapons&Tools**
This texture pack adds more **variety and style to your weapons and tools** in Minecraft. You can choose different looks inspired/pulled by Minecraft Dungeons, such as **axes, swords, bows, crossbows, and tools**. Some of them even have sheaths when held in the left hand.There is a left hand support pack.

**Rename your items** to change their appearance. The new looks works with diamond and netherite items, and most of them with iron items. The default material for some designs is wood, stone,  gold or diamond.     ***RENAME LIST BELOW***

The **vanilla textures of weapons and tools are also retextured** to match the Minecraft Dungeons style.

This texture pack is perfect for you if you want to **spice up your arsenal** and be different from your friends with your unique look.


<details>
<summary>RENAME LIST</summary>

     -

         - Sinister Sword

![Stone Man holding a Chill Gale Knife and a Burst Gale Bow](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/hqp8t2HY/images/f1f801e0d16ed5807f98761eb34c2acde2dea230.png)

IF YOU WHOULD LIKE TO MAKE A VIDEO COVERING THIS TEXTURE PACK, YOU WILL NEED TO:

1. Leave my name and the link to the PMC/Modrinth page in the pinned comment or discription;

2. Mention where you placed the link (Pinned comment/Description) somewhere in your video;

3. Not claim this is yours.
